details.test: Task 1: Save Premiership match report to Reading List and verify
Task 2: Follow top two Premiership teams from league table
Task 3: Create 'Aberdeen transfers' collection and add transfer articles
Task 4: Enable team fixture alerts and set notification delivery to on-site only
Task 5: Add Rangers home highlights (>=5min) to Watch Later and play
Task 6: Configure personalised feed (Premiership, Aberdeen, Transfers) and open item
Task 7: Follow top Premiership goal scorer (>=10 goals)
Task 8: Pin match commentary to dashboard and verify pinned item
Task 9: Save transfer article link into profile personal notes
